simple: Minimal starter — web search, fetch, run code
web-researcher: Research assistant — search + page visits for detailed answers
smart-research: Multi-phase research — gather, analyze, respond with dynamic tools
memory-agent: Persistent memory — remembers facts across conversations via KV
code-interpreter: JavaScript sandbox — math, data processing, calculations
math-buddy: Calculations, unit conversions, dice rolls via run_code
health-assistant: Medication lookup, drug interactions, BMI, symptom guidance
personal-finance: Currency, crypto prices, loan calculations, savings projections
travel-concierge: Trip planning — weather, flights, hotels, currency conversion
night-owl: Movie/music/book recs by mood, sleep calculator — custom UI
pizza-ordering: Pizza order-taker with dynamic cart sidebar — custom UI
dispatch-center: 911 dispatch with triage and resource assignment — custom UI
infocom-adventure: Zork-style text adventure with puzzles and inventory — custom UI
solo-rpg: Dark-fantasy RPG with dice, combat, save/load — custom UI
embedded-assets: FAQ bot using embedded JSON knowledge (no web search)
test-patterns: Reference — demonstrates every testable agent pattern
